description: Execution and debugging corrections. Retry discipline, resource awareness, progress checking.

corrections.what_went_wrong: Retried the same failing approach multiple times expecting different results
corrections.correct_approach: If something fails twice with the same approach, stop. Investigate the root cause. Try a fundamentally different approach or escalate to the user.
corrections.detection: Same command or action attempted 3+ times

corrections.what_went_wrong: Ran a long-running or resource-intensive operation without warning the user
corrections.correct_approach: If an operation might take more than 30 seconds or consume significant resources, tell the user before starting. Offer to run in background.
corrections.detection: Large builds, full test suites, big file operations, model training
